steps.title: Make two whale-length points
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the whale is 162 cm long, so the starting value is $162$. The whale grows $4.8$ cm per month, so the slope is $4.8$.

steps.title: Read the linear model
steps.content: A linear model is $$y=\text{starting value}+(\text{monthly growth})x.$$ Substituting the values gives $$y=162+4.8x,$$ or $$y=4.8x+162.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is the only equation with starting length $162$ and monthly growth $4.8$. D is correct.
